name: Alfredo Sauce (Lowfat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a small saucepan.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through and smooth.
5. Serve with hot, cooked fettuccini.
6. Makes 4 servings.
